name: Particle
description: Particle — IoT device platform with cellular connectivity, fleet management OTA updates, and device cloud API.

seo.title: Particle — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Particle: Particle — IoT device platform with cellular connectivity, fleet management OTA updates, and device cloud API.

when_to_use: Cellular IoT device management with OTA updates and fleet ops
Connecting embedded hardware to cloud via Particle Device Cloud
LTE and Wi-Fi device provisioning for connected product makers
Remote firmware deployment to 1000+ field Particle devices
Rapid IoT prototyping with Particle hardware and cloud API

cons: Cellular costs add up at scale
Smaller than AWS IoT for enterprise
review.verdict: Full-stack IoT that saves you time, best when you want hardware plus cloud from one vendor.
review.best_for: IoT product teams wanting cellular connectivity and fleet management without stitching vendors
review.not_for: Massive low-cost sensor deployments or teams already on AWS or Azure IoT

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

lock_in.reason: IoT devices tied to cloud platform

developer_experience.reason: strong IoT dev tooling and docs
